[[BLOCK:slide57_shape0]]
• JASP can read comma-separated files (CSV) and SPSS files (SAV), but it cannot read Excel files.  
• You can open data files via the "File: Open" option or by right-clicking the file and selecting "Open with JASP."  
• Select Regularized Linear Regression (正则化线性回归 (Regularized Regression)) from Machine Learning.  
• Input Y as the Target.  
• Input Age, BMI, BP, Total Cholesterol (总胆固醇), Low-Density Lipoprotein Cholesterol (LDL), High-Density Lipoprotein Cholesterol (HDL), Triglycerides (TCH), Triglycerides (TCH), Low Triglycerides (LTG), and Glucose as Features.  
• Check Regression Coefficients, Data Split, and Predictive Performance.
